name: Hikvision Attendance Report
query:
SELECT
    base.employee AS "Employee:Link/Employee:140",
    base.employee_name AS "Employee Name:Data:220",
    base.hikvision_id AS "Hik Vision ID:Data:130",
    base.attendance_date AS "Date:Date:100",
    base.entry_time AS "Entry:Time:90",
    base.exit_time AS "Exit:Time:90",
    CASE
        WHEN base.entry_time IS NULL THEN 'NO IN'
        WHEN base.entry_time > '08:00:00' THEN 'LATE'
        ELSE 'OK'
    END AS "Entry Issue:Data:95",
    CASE
        WHEN base.exit_time IS NULL THEN 'NO OUT'
        WHEN base.exit_time < '17:00:00' THEN 'EARLY'
        ELSE 'OK'
    END AS "Exit Issue:Data:95",
    SEC_TO_TIME(base.worked_seconds) AS "Extra Time:Data:100",
    base.designation AS "Puesto:Link/Designation:160",
    base.department AS "Main Department:Link/Department:180"
FROM (
    SELECT
        he.employee_no AS employee,
        COALESCE(emp.employee_name, he.name_field) AS employee_name,
        he.employee_no AS hikvision_id,
        DATE(he.event_time) AS attendance_date,
        MIN(TIME(he.event_time)) AS entry_time,
        MAX(TIME(he.event_time)) AS exit_time,
        TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, MIN(he.event_time), MAX(he.event_time)) AS worked_seconds,
        emp.designation AS designation,
        emp.department AS department
    FROM
        `tabHikvision Event` he
    LEFT JOIN
        `tabEmployee` emp ON emp.name = he.employee_no
    WHERE
        he.event_time IS NOT NULL
        AND DATE(he.event_time) BETWEEN %(from_date)s AND %(to_date)s
        AND (%(employee)s IS NULL OR %(employee)s = '' OR he.employee_no = %(employee)s)
        AND (%(department)s IS NULL OR %(department)s = '' OR emp.department = %(department)s)
        AND (%(designation)s IS NULL OR %(designation)s = '' OR emp.designation = %(designation)s)
    GROUP BY
        he.employee_no,
        COALESCE(emp.employee_name, he.name_field),
        DATE(he.event_time),
        emp.designation,
        emp.department
) base
WHERE
    (
        COALESCE(%(show_entries_late)s, 0) = 0
        OR base.entry_time > '08:00:00'
    )
    AND (
        COALESCE(%(show_leave_before)s, 0) = 0
        OR base.exit_time < '17:00:00'
    )
ORDER BY
    base.attendance_date DESC,
    base.employee ASC;
